channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy lay out plans for 'mass' federal layoffs, rule rollbacks under Trump
item.description: Tech entrepreneurs Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy said Wednesday that their brand-new government efficiency panel will identify “thousands” of regulations for President-elect Trump to eliminate, which they argue will justify “mass head-count reductions” across government.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks, once star performers for the entertainment giant
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Comcast will spin off many of its cable television networks that were once at the heart of the entertainment giant, with people increasingly swapping out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: You’ll soon be able to clone your voice to speak other languages ​​in Teams
item.description: In connection with this year’s Ignite conference, Microsoft has unveiled a new interpretation tool that will be added to Teams in the spring.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Future of AI: Trump Vows to Repeal Biden's Policy Amid Global Meeting on Safety Measures
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's promise to repeal President Joe Biden's AI policy has left experts wondering about its impact on the future of artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenTelemetry certification launches
item.description: A new certification program from the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) and Linux Foundation is aimed at validating the skills needed to utilize OpenTelemetry to gain visibility across distributed systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft upgrades Copilot Studio agent builder tools
item.description: Microsoft at this week’s Ignite conference unveiled new Copilot Studio features aimed at both expanding the functionality of AI agents created with the application and improving the accuracy of outputs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ChatGPT’s Windows app beats Microsoft Copilot for productivity
item.description: Microsoft’s Copilot AI assistant appears to be transforming into a chatty AI sidekick, and I’ve seen quite a few Copilot users who aren’t happy about it. Thankfully, there’s now another option for anyone interested in using AI purely for productivity — a full-featured ChatGPT app for Windows PCs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Talk of Simplified Tax Filing App Stirs Market Reaction
item.description: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy's Department of Government Efficiency explores a free mobile tax-filing app, shaking up companies like Intuit and H&R Block
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: New eagle camera is going live in Minnesota to the delight of global viewers
item.description: Eagle lovers around the world who were crushed when the nest of a Minnesota pair and their chick collapsed on live video last year will get a when a new eagle camera goes live this week.
item.dc:creator: Steve Karnowski, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Government commission proposes Manhattan Project-style AI funding plan
item.description: A U.S. congressional commission proposed a "Manhattan Project-like" initiative for the funding of artificial intelligence (AI) development in a larger push to stay ahead of China's technological advancements. The report, issued Tuesday by the bipartisan U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The 11 next big things in AI and data innovations for 2024
item.description: The AI big bang that first caught the world’s attention with ChatGPT is sending energy and innovation out in many directions. Large language models aren’t just chatting and summarizing text: Now they’re also reasoning through problems with increasing autonomy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Foxconn takes another big step toward AI iPhone manufacturing
item.description: Apple’s main manufacturing partner, Foxconn, has announced it is working with Nvidia to build digital twins that it says will reshape the future of manufacturing and supply chain management.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Instagram rolls out option to reset recommendations
item.description: Instagram is testing a new feature that allows users to reset their content recommendations on the platform when in need of a "fresh start.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: This tool is made for the laziest parent ever
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how an innovative Easy-Way kit turns standard strollers electric, simplifying navigation for parents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DOJ seeks historic action against Google, proposes force-sale of Chrome
item.description: The US Department of Justice (DOJ) is intensifying its antitrust actions against Google, proposing a historic move that could reshape the tech landscape.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump appears to be planning to attend SpaceX ‘Starship’ launch scheduled for Tuesday in Texas
item.description: Trump’s visit comes as billionaire Musk has been a near-constant presence at Trump’s side as he builds out his administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft's Anticompetitive Behavior Weakens Its Customers' Cybersecurity
item.description: Microsoft's restrictive licensing practices and bundling tactics have raised concerns about customer choice, innovation, and security in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Exoskeleton helps paralyzed people regain independence
item.description: The WalkON Suit F1, an exoskeleton developed to help people with disabilities, can actually walk over to a person in a wheelchair, solving a major problem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rust Foundation moves forward on C++ and Rust interoperability
item.description: The Rust Foundation, which stewards development of the Rust language, has released a statement addressing challenges and opportunities for interoperability between Rust and C++, with the intent of making cross-language development more accessible and approachable.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: One Tech Tip: Replacing passwords with passkeys for an easier login experience
item.description: LONDON (AP) — If you're tired of memorizing passwords, then give passkeys a try. You might have noticed that many online services are now offering the option of using passkeys, a digital authentication method touted as an easier and more secure way to log in.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4
